description: Composition:Black leather kitten heels with fake button effect on the uppershoe care:Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustFitting:Regular FitThese black kitten heels from catwalk are subtly stylish and perfect for formal and semi formal occassions. The simple design of these shoes creates a well groomed appearance. Team these with a pair of formal pants for meetings or business brunches.
